title: Fabric API MCP Server
description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that runs inside Minecraft Java Edition as a Fabric mod. It exposes the server-side Minecraft API and the Fabric API as MCP tools so Claude, Cursor, etc. can read and manipulate a live world programmatically.
body:
A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that runs inside Minecraft Java Edition as a Fabric mod. It exposes the server-side Minecraft API and the Fabric API as MCP tools so an MCP client — Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any agent that speaks MCP — can read and manipulate a live world programmatically.

Works with the accompanying plugin for Claude Code: [https://github.com/chapmanjw/minecraft-java-fabric-claude-plugin](https://github.com/chapmanjw/minecraft-java-fabric-claude-plugin)

Requires the Fabric API: [https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
